text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Mar 29 15:43:35 2014
New Revision: 349547
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349547
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349547/

Log:
  - Update to 1.6.2
  
  PR:		ports/187998
  Submitted by:	Michael Moll <kvedulv@kvedulv.de>

Modified:
  head/www/rubygem-thin/Makefile
  head/www/rubygem-thin/distinfo

Modified: head/www/rubygem-thin/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/rubygem-thin/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 15:39:57 2014	(r349546)
+++ head/www/rubygem-thin/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 15:43:35 2014	(r349547)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	thin
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.11
+PORTVERSION=	1.6.2
 CATEGORIES=	www rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Fast and simple Ruby web server
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-rack>=1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-rack \
-		rubygem-eventmachine>=0.12.6:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-eventmachine \
+		rubygem-eventmachine>=1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-eventmachine \
 		rubygem-daemons>=1.0.9:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-daemons
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes

==============================================================================
--- head/www/rubygem-thin/distinfo	Sat Mar 29 15:39:57 2014	(r349546)
+++ head/www/rubygem-thin/distinfo	Sat Mar 29 15:43:35 2014	(r349547)
